--- with_next.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
WITH 1 AS a
RETURN a
NEXT
RETURN a

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLWith{
            With:  15,
            Items: []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 20,
                  ValueEnd: 21,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "1",
                },
                Alias: &ast.AsAlias{
                  As:    22,
                  Alias: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 25,
                    NameEnd: 26,
                    Name:    "a",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 27,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 34,
                  NameEnd: 35,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 41,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 48,
                  NameEnd: 49,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph WITH 1 AS a RETURN a NEXT RETURN a
